expected_signals.summary: vLLM published version 0.24.0 with broad model, engine, parser, serving, quantization, and API updates.
The release fixes denial-of-service, information disclosure, and input-validation issues.
The release changes device selection to use an explicit device_ids argument instead of internal CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES handling.

notes: Do not miss the security fixes or the device-selection change. No runnable verifier: this is a static document-labeling task; the anchor quotes are the observable evidence.
